translations: cause me to land (at) a landing place
puzzle.hint: A supplication taught to Prophet Nuh (Noah) for seeking a blessed place to settle after the great flood.
puzzle.arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَنزِلْنِى مُنزَلًۭا مُّبَارَكًۭا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْمُنزِلِينَ
puzzle.verseEn: And say, 'My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, and You are the best to accommodate [us].'"
